mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iot_notification_channel(tenant_id, org_id, name, type, enabled, config_json, is_delete, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{orgId}, #{name}, #{type}, #{enabled}, #{configJson}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM iot_notification_channel WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND is_delete = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE iot_notification_channel SET name = #{name}, type = #{type}, enabled = #{enabled}, config_json = #{configJson}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0
